title: betl connections bundle (v0.1)
description: Schema for a betl connection-bundle file. Discriminator key is `betl_connections: 1`. Pulled into pipelines via `include:`. See SPEC §5.3.

betl_connections.description: Document-kind discriminator. Must be `1` for v0.1 connection bundles.

connections.description: Map of connection name → connection definition.

dsn.description: Connection string. MUST be a substitution (`${env.X}`, `${secret.X}`, or a file-path indirection); inline literals are a lint error.
